text: A pen is a writing tool that uses ink to mark surfaces
original_text: A pen is a writing tool that uses ink to mark surfaces.

text: pens can use ballpoint, gel, fountain, rollerball, or felt-tip mechanisms
original_text: Pens can use ballpoint, gel, fountain, rollerball, or felt-tip mechanisms.

text: pen marks are usually more permanent than pencil marks

text: A good pen can make writing feel smoother and more satisfying
original_text: A good pen can make writing feel smoother and more satisfying.
